base_size.note: Full screen canvas, individual elements vary

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Horizontal wooden perch where Echo stands in all non-sleeping states
context.screen_position: Horizontal bar at y=80px, spanning from x=24px to x=104px (80px wide)
adjacent_elements: echo (all states except sleeping - Echo's feet rest on this perch)
context.usage_scenario: Static environmental element that Echo stands on. Provides visual grounding for Echo's position. Always visible during gameplay.

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal cylindrical wooden bar. Top surface is 80px wide, 2px tall (#AB5236). Bottom edge has 1px darker line (#5F574F) to suggest roundness. Optional: 1-2px highlight on top left (#C2C3C7) to suggest light source.
visual_specification.texture: Simple pixel representation of wood grain - 2-3 vertical lines (1px wide, 2-3px tall) in slightly darker brown (#5F574F) spaced 15-20px apart along the perch.
visual_specification.details: Perch is 80px wide, 4px tall. Positioned at y=80px (center-left to center-right). Top 2px are #AB5236, bottom 1px is darker (#5F574F) for depth. Optional wood grain marks every 15-20px. Echo's feet (2px wide each) rest on top surface.

relationships.shared_with: All Echo states use this perch as standing platform
relationships.differences_from: Unlike food bowl: not interactive, horizontal orientation. Unlike floor: elevated position, smaller area.

explicit_negations: No end caps or mounting hardware visible
